channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ORIENTALTL] Oriental Trimex Ltd Receives Annual Disclosure from Promoters with No New Encumbrances in FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Oriental Trimex Ltd has received the Annual Disclosure under regulation 31(4) of SEBI (SAST) Regulation, 2011, from the promoter and promoters groups including persons acting in concert. The disclosure reveals that no new encumbrances, directly or indirectly, were made during the financial year ended on March 31, 2026. Savita Punia, a promoter, had 25,00,000 encumbered or pledged shares as of March 31, 2026. This declaration is in accordance with Regulation 31(4) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Oriental Trimex Ltd received Annual Disclosure from promoters and promoter groups
  • No new encumbrances were made during the financial year ended on March 31, 2026
  • Savita Punia had 25,00,000 encumbered or pledged shares as of March 31, 2026
  • Declaration is in accordance with Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
  • Disclosure received from all persons acting in concert with promoters

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ORIENTAL TRIMEX LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [CAPITALSFB] Capital Small Finance Bank Ltd to Approve Audited Financial Results on April 29, 2026
item.description:
Capital Small Finance Bank Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on April 29, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited financial results (Standalone) of the Bank for the period ended March 31, 2026. This intimation is in accordance with the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Capital Small Finance Bank Ltd to hold a Board Meeting on April 29, 2026
  • The meeting will consider and approve the Audited financial results (Standalone) for the period ended March 31, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Capital Small Finance Bank Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [LOKESHMACH] Lokesh Machines Ltd Alters Share Capital Clause in MOA: Key Details
item.description:
Lokesh Machines Ltd announced an alteration of the Share Capital Clause in its Memorandum of Association (MOA) during an Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) on April 03, 2026. The amendment, which affects the company's authorized share capital, is now detailed in Annexure-I of the announcement.

  • Lokesh Machines Ltd alters the Share Capital Clause in its MOA.
  • The alteration was approved in an EGM held on April 03, 2026.
  • The amendment impacts the company's authorized share capital of Rs. 25,00,00,000.
  • The new capital structure consists of 2,50,00,000 Equity Shares of Rs.10/- each.
  • The changes are summarized in Annexure-I of the official announcement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LOKESH MACHINES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ARCL] ARCL Organics Ltd. Expands Manufacturing Footprint with Land and Machinery Acquisition in Gujarat for Rs. 3 Crores
item.description:
ARCL Organics Ltd. has announced the purchase of land and machinery from M/s. Angel Resins, owned by Mr. Sandeep Patel and Mr. Hashmukhbhai Patel, located in Gujarat. The acquisition includes industrial plant, machinery, and related equipment used for powder resin manufacturing. The company paid Rs. 3 Crores for the assets and expects the acquisition to strengthen its manufacturing footprint and enhance operational capacity. Regulatory approvals have been obtained, and the company will now apply for changes in various licenses.

  • ARCL Organics Ltd. purchases land and machinery from M/s. Angel Resins in Gujarat.
  • The acquisition includes industrial plant, machinery, and related equipment for powder resin manufacturing.
  • The transaction amount is Rs. 3 Crores.
  • Regulatory approvals have been taken, and the company will apply for changes in various licenses.
  • The acquisition is expected to strengthen the company's manufacturing footprint and enhance operational capacity.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ARCL Organics Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [MOIL] Moil Ltd Fixes New Prices for Manganese Ore Grades, Effective April 1, 2026
item.description:
Moil Ltd, in accordance with its business practice, has fixed/revised the prices of various grades of Manganese Ore and other products, effective from April 1, 2026. The prices of all Ferro grades of manganese ore with Manganese content of Mn- 44% and above have been increased by 15%. The prices of all other Ferro grades of manganese ore with Manganese content below Mn-44% have been increased by 17.5%. The prices of SMGR (Mn-30%), SMGR (Mn 25%), and Fines grades have also been increased by 17.5%. The prices of Chemical grades have been increased by 17.5% as well. The basic price of Rs.1,80,000/- PMT of EMD has been continued for the month of April, 2026.

  • Moil Ltd fixes new prices for various grades of Manganese Ore
  • Prices of Ferro grades with Mn- 44% and above increased by 15%
  • Prices of Ferro grades with Mn content below Mn-44% increased by 17.5%
  • Prices of SMGR, Fines, and Chemical grades increased by 17.5%
  • Basic price of Rs.1,80,000/- PMT of EMD continued for April, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MOIL LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [TYPHOON] Typhoon Holdings Ltd Appoints Ms. Geeta Jonwal as Independent Director, Ms. Shvetalben Sagarbhai Dataniya Resigns
item.description:
Typhoon Holdings Ltd has appointed Ms. Geeta Jonwal as an Additional Director for the Category of Non-Executive Independent Director for a period of five consecutive years. Ms. Shvetalben Sagarbhai Dataniya has resigned from her post as Independent Director due to not willing to continue in this role. The changes will be effective from 3rd April 2026, subject to the approval of regulatory/statutory authorities and the shareholders of the Company at the General Meeting.

  • Ms. Geeta Jonwal appointed as Additional Director for a term of five years.
  • Ms. Shvetalben Sagarbhai Dataniya resigns from her post as Independent Director.
  • Effective date for both changes is 3rd April 2026.
  • Appointment and resignation subject to approval by regulatory authorities and shareholders.
  • No material reason for Ms. Shvetalben Sagarbhai Dataniya's resignation other than her decision not to continue.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Typhoon Holdings Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [TYPHOON] Typhoon Holdings Ltd: Independent Director Ms. Shveralben Dataniya Resigns, Ms. Geeta Jonwal Appointed
item.description:
Typhoon Holdings Ltd announced the resignation of Ms. Shveralben Dataniya from her post as Independent Director, effective April 3, 2026. The Board has appointed Ms. Geeta Jonwal as an Additional Director in her place, for a term of five consecutive years, subject to regulatory and shareholder approvals. Ms. Jonwal brings over 3 years of experience in the agri commodities field and marketing of agro and related products. She has no relationships with existing directors and is not barred from holding the office of director by any SEBI order.

  • Ms. Shveralben Dataniya resigns as Independent Director of Typhoon Holdings Ltd.
  • Ms. Geeta Jonwal appointed as Additional Director for a term of five years.
  • Ms. Jonwal has over 3 years of experience in agri commodities and marketing.
  • Ms. Jonwal has no relationships with existing directors.
  • Ms. Jonwal is not barred from holding the office of director by any SEBI order.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Typhoon Holdings Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ECOBOAR] Ecoboard Industries Receives Work Order of Rs. 495 Lakhs from Betul Biofuel Private Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ecoboard Industries Ltd. has announced the receipt of a work order and signing of an agreement with Betul Biofuel Private Limited on 02nd April, 2026, for a total amount of Rs. 495 Lakhs. This order is for Engineering, Procurement, Manufacture, Fabrication, Supply, Transportation, Erection and Commissioning of a G TPD CBG Plant. The order is expected to be executed within 5 months, with an additional grace period of 15 days from the date of the Letter of Intent.

  • Ecoboard Industries received a work order from Betul Biofuel Private Limited worth Rs. 495 Lakhs.
  • The order is for Engineering, Procurement, Manufacture, Fabrication, Supply, Transportation, Erection and Commissioning of a G TPD CBG Plant.
  • The agreement was signed on 02nd April, 2026.
  • The order is expected to be executed within 5 months, with an additional grace period of 15 days from the date of the Letter of Intent.
  • The deal falls under the domain of Ecoboard Industries and is not a related party transaction.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ECOBOARD INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [KANANIIND] Kanani Industries Ltd Changes Registered Office Address
item.description:
Kanani Industries Ltd, a company registered in Mumbai, has updated its registered office address. The previous address was GE-1080, Bharat Diamond Bourse, G-Block, Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (East), Mumbai — 400051, Maharashtra. The new address is DC-6112-6113, Bharat Diamond Bourse, G-Block, Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (East), Mumbai — 400051, Maharashtra. This change was made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Kanani Industries Ltd has changed its registered office address.
  • The previous registered office address was GE-1080, Bharat Diamond Bourse, G-Block, Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (East), Mumbai — 400051, Maharashtra.
  • The new registered office address is DC-6112-6113, Bharat Diamond Bourse, G-Block, Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (East), Mumbai — 400051, Maharashtra.
  • This change was made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
  • The company's new address is effective immediately.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KANANI INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [TYPHOON] Typhoon Holdings Ltd: Appointment of Ms. Geeta Jonwal as Additional Director and Resignation of Ms. Shvetalben Sagarbhai Dataniya
item.description:
Typhoon Holdings Ltd announced the outcomes of their Board Meeting held on Friday, April 3, 2026. The Board has approved the appointment of Ms. Geeta Jonwal as an Additional Director for the Category of Non-Executive Independent Director for a period of five consecutive years, subject to regulatory/statutory authorities and shareholders' approval. Ms. Shvetalben Sagarbhai Dataniya has resigned from her position as Independent Director due to her unwillingness to continue in this role.

  • Appointment of Ms. Geeta Jonwal as Additional Director
  • Ms. Geeta Jonwal to serve as Non-Executive Independent Director
  • Appointment subject to approval from regulatory/statutory authorities and shareholders
  • Resignation of Ms. Shvetalben Sagarbhai Dataniya as Independent Director
  • Ms. Shvetalben Sagarbhai Dataniya's resignation due to unwillingness to continue

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Typhoon Holdings Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
